name: panic
summary: Unrecoverable error. Rust/Go: terminate goroutine/thread với stack trace. Không dùng cho recoverable errors.

facts.text: Rust panic: unwind stack (cleanup) hoặc abort. Bắt bằng catch_unwind
Go panic: stop goroutine, chạy deferred, propagate. recover() bắt được
panic: contract violation, invariant broken, logic error

danger: panic không phải cho expected errors — dùng Result/error
